skills.name: SDD Init
skills.description: Initialize Spec-Driven Development context in a project

skills.name: SDD Explore
skills.description: Explore and investigate ideas before committing to a change

skills.name: SDD Propose
skills.description: Create a change proposal with intent, scope, and approach

skills.name: SDD Spec
skills.description: Write specifications with requirements and scenarios

skills.name: SDD Design
skills.description: Create technical design document with architecture decisions

skills.name: SDD Tasks
skills.description: Break down specs and designs into implementation tasks

skills.name: SDD Apply
skills.description: Implement tasks from the change, writing actual code

skills.name: SDD Verify
skills.description: Validate that implementation matches specs, design, and tasks

skills.name: SDD Archive
skills.description: Sync delta specs to main specs and archive a completed change

skills.name: Mermaid Diagrams
skills.description: Render Mermaid diagrams as SVG or ASCII art

skills.name: Skill Registry
skills.description: Create or update the skill registry for the current project

skills.name: Issue Creation
skills.description: Issue creation workflow for Agent Teams Lite

skills.name: Branch PR
skills.description: PR creation workflow for Agent Teams Lite
